json_data.title: Information Retrieval
json_data.reason: This topic explores the techniques and algorithms behind search engines and document ranking, a key application area mentioned in the NLP overview.

json_data.title: Deep Learning Architectures for NLP
json_data.reason: This topic delves into advanced neural network models like Transformers and their applications, providing a deeper understanding of the 'large models' and their computational challenges in modern NLP.

json_data.title: Low-Resource and Cross-Lingual NLP
json_data.reason: This research area directly addresses the significant challenge of data scarcity for many non-English languages, requiring innovative approaches to adapt NLP models across diverse linguistic contexts.
